tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and package manifest to understand the app purpose, stack, and commands.

tour.title: Application Shell
tour.description: Follow the root layout, home page, and hub page to see how users enter the internal dashboard.

tour.title: Calculator Workflow
tour.description: Inspect the calculator client surface where pricing and quote helper behavior is concentrated.

tour.title: Referral Workflow
tour.description: Review the referrals page and server actions, then connect them to the Prisma data model.

tour.title: Reference Data Areas
tour.description: Explore garments and reference routes that support day-to-day sales operations.
